intro.title: Dermatology organized as a system, not as a brochure page.
intro.deck: Browse diagnosis, medical aesthetics, pediatrics, and telemedicine from one public shell with booking continuity.

clinical.title: Clinical Dermatology
clinical.deck: Lesions, hair, nails, acne, rosacea, and medical triage with clearer reading.

aesthetic.title: Medical Aesthetics
aesthetic.deck: Laser, peels, toxin, and collagen stimulation grouped as medical programs.

children.title: Pediatric Dermatology
children.deck: A dedicated entry point for children and teenagers with family-oriented follow-up.

footer.title: Piel en Armonia
footer.deck: One unified public experience for diagnosis, care programs, telemedicine, and booking.
